_note: synced_through_commit is the LOGICAL cursor: the upstream commit through which evolution-upstream-sync has ACCOUNTED for every commit (applied OR deferred). Each run processes the next <=25 commits AFTER it (oldest-first) and advances it — so nothing in the window is ever silently skipped. Seeded to the merge-base of our main and upstream/main (the honest contiguous synced point). synced_through_tag/date = newest upstream release tag that is an ancestor of the cursor (mirrored into __release_date__ for the banner); they advance ONLY when the cursor crosses a new tag. deferred[] records commits evaluated but not applied (conflict/irrelevant) with reasons, for owner review.
